/usr/bin/c++ -Os -g -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/config-store-save.dir/config-store-save.cc.o" -o /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/src/config-store/examples/ns3.45-config-store-save-default   -L/home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib -Wl,--no-as-needed /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-config-store-default.so -Wl,--as-needed /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-core-default.so -Wl,--no-as-needed -Wl,--as-needed /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libxml2.so
